PAYMENT TERMS
Standard terms of payment are Net 30 days. We also accept VISA, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit cards.

PRIVACY POLICY
In the process of conducting business with customers, Reliable Imaging may collect information, such as but not limited to, customer's name, company name, title, phone number, e-mail address, site name, URL and address.

Reliable Imaging will use collected information to fulfill orders, information requests, and to improve our products and services. At no time will Reliable Imaging sell customer information to third parties.

RETURN POLICY
Reliable Imaging will work with a location on a return. The return policy is thirty (30) days unconditional; after that, six (6) months exchange for either upgraded equipment (i.e., no longer using the same printers), or defective product.

  • printer ink and toner cartridges
  • fax ink and supplies
  • fusers
  • back-up media
  • other I.T. supplies
  • maintenance kits
  • cleaning cartridges
  • maintenance service
  • managed print services
